stemHtml: Which type(s) of weather phenomena justify issuing an aviation special weather report (SPECI)?

options.a: Severe weather, if observed at a minimum of two of the three nearest airfields.
options.b: Significant changes of surface winds, visibility, cloud base height, and occurrence of severe weather.
options.c: Significant changes of air pressure, temperature, visibility, cloud cover, and wind direction.
options.d: An upcoming thunderstorm, which is presumed to arrive at the reporting airfield within the next 2 hours.
